title: Suspicion Worklist
description: Deterministic, confidence-INDEPENDENT structural-risk worklist emitted by suspicion_scan.py (RFC #215 Phase 2, default path {durable_root}/suspicion_worklist.json). One entry per canon source_form that tripped >=1 structural risk class; the skeptic pass (skeptic_setup.py -> skeptic-pass-wf.template.js) reads ONLY this file to decide who to adversarially re-examine. producer_input_digest binds this worklist to the exact canon.json + manifest.json + canon_senses.json (raw bytes, #243) + resolved LanguageConfig.raw_bytes + resolved scan parameters + the producer code closure (suspicion_scan.py, occ_index.py, bootstrap_names.py, canon_senses.py, skeptic_constants.py) it was built from; skeptic_setup.py recomputes the identical digest and REJECTS a stale worklist fail-closed, so a since-changed canon/manifest/senses-sidecar/config/scanner can never be silently reprocessed. Strict at every level (additionalProperties:false, full required[]) so a producer bug fails LOUD.

producer_input_digest.description: sha256 hex over canon.json + manifest.json + canon_senses.json (raw bytes, #243 -- absent sidecar hashes as empty bytes, distinct from a schema-valid logically-empty document) + canonically-serialized resolved scan parameters + resolved LanguageConfig.raw_bytes + the bytes of suspicion_scan.py, occ_index.py, bootstrap_names.py, canon_senses.py, skeptic_constants.py. Re-verified by skeptic_setup.py.

entries.description: One entry per flagged source_form, deterministic order (see suspicion_scan.py). An empty array is the schema-valid 'nothing structurally suspicious' state.

source_form.description: The canon.json entry key (NFC surface form).

canonical_target_form.description: The entry's canonical_target_form (carried through for the merge-group / rescope context).

occurrence_refs.description: Every occurrence backing the flag. origin='block' refs (offsets into manifest.blocks[block].plain_text) are the CITABLE windows the skeptic feeds and evidences against; origin='verse_embedded' refs (offsets into the verse.store[].plain_text whose placeholder lives in `block`) are LABEL-ONLY -- counted for singleton/dispersion/all_citation precision but NOT citable (evidence_verify authenticates against blocks{} only, so a verse citation coerces to insufficient_window).

block.description: For origin='block': the manifest block id. For origin='verse_embedded': the carrier parent_block id (a real blocks{} key per validate_extraction.py).

vid.description: verse.store vid; present ONLY for origin='verse_embedded' (identifies the embedded verse node whose plain_text the offsets index into).

group_key.description: normalize_form(canonical_target_form) -- present for merge_participant so the skeptic sees the whole over-merged group.

notes.description: Machine annotations (e.g. citation_classification_unavailable, verse_parent_unresolved, no_occurrences, near_pair_budget_truncated). Never a verdict.
